name: Discord Broadcast
shortDesc: Instantly send automated messages and notifications to any Discord channel.
description: The Discord Broadcast API enables seamless integration between your applications and Discord. Provide a webhook URL, and securely dispatch text notifications, alerts, or logs into your community or team channels instantly.

params.name: content
params.desc: The message text to send to the channel.

params.name: username
params.desc: Override the default webhook bot username.

howItWorks: You generate a Webhook URL from your Discord Server settings.
Send a payload with the URL and your message content to our API.
We instantly dispatch the message to Discord using optimized server-to-server delivery.
useCases: Sending system health alerts to DevOps teams
Announcing new user signups in community channels
Bridging in-game chat to Discord servers
